name: Xcitium OpenEDR
description: Integrates with Xcitium OpenEDR and Xcitium Advanced API for open-source endpoint detection and response with MITRE ATT&CK analytics, real-time telemetry, and containment actions

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve EDR alerts including MITRE ATT&CK technique mappings and threat progression data

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time for alert query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time for alert query (ISO 8601)

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific alert including root cause analysis

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: Retrieve the list of endpoints monitored by Xcitium OpenEDR

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of endpoints to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by hostname, IP, or OS

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by endpoint status (online, offline, isolated)

actions.name: Get Endpoint Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific endpoint including telemetry status

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint

actions.name: Isolate Endpoint
actions.description: Isolate an endpoint from the network to contain a detected threat

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint to isolate

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Reason for isolating the endpoint

actions.name: Release Endpoint from Isolation
actions.description: Remove network isolation from a previously contained endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint to release

actions.name: List Telemetry Events
actions.description: Retrieve endpoint telemetry events (process, file, network, registry) for threat hunting

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Filter by event type (process, file, network, registry)

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: Filter events by endpoint ID

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time for event query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time for event query (ISO 8601)

actions.name: Search IOC
actions.description: Search for indicators of compromise across all monitored endpoints

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: IOC type: sha256, sha1, md5, ip, domain

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The IOC value to search for

actions.name: Contain File
actions.description: Contain (auto-sandbox) an unknown or suspicious file in Xcitium's containment environment

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to contain

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The endpoint ID where the file was observed

actions.name: Get File Verdict
actions.description: Retrieve the verdict for a file from Xcitium's Valkyrie analysis engine

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to check
